description: Artifacts shipped by product-spec 1.x (the claude-pack / spec-critique era) that a 2.x recipient bundle no longer ships. The upgrade legacy-sweep removes these so a 1.x -> 2.x upgrade does not leave a Frankenstein install (a doubled critique skill, an orphan packer skill, dead dev-kit rules). Safety contract enforced by upgrade_planner/upgrade_apply, NOT by this data: every removal is backed up to a timestamped backup dir BEFORE deletion (recoverable); a file whose content differs from a known-pristine hash is PROMPTed (Keep/Change), never blind-removed; a symlink at a legacy path is unlinked only, never followed; and rule removals (whose basenames collide with this dev repo's own rules) only activate when a legacy signature is present in the target tree.

entries.reason: renamed in 2.0.0 (spec-critique -> product-spec-critique); leaving it doubles the critique skill
renamed to 'release' in 2.0.0 and NOT shipped to recipients (dev-only toolchain); leaving it is an orphan packer skill
1.x shipped dev workflow rules to recipients; the 2.x recipient bundle ships no rules (rules: [])
